mapper.insert: insert into expenses (store_seq, category_seq, expense_date, title, amount, memo, payment_method, supplier_name, ref_type, ref_seq, created_at) values ( #{storeSeq}, #{categorySeq}, #{expenseDate}, #{title}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{paymentMethod}, #{supplierName}, #{refType}, #{refSeq}, Now() )
mapper.select: SELECT category_seq AS categorySeq, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM expenses WHERE store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND DATE_FORMAT(expense_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} GROUP BY category_seq

SELECT e.expense_seq AS expenseSeq, e.store_seq AS storeSeq, e.category_seq AS categorySeq, DATE_FORMAT(e.expense_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expenseDate, e.title AS title, e.amount AS amount, e.memo AS memo, e.payment_method AS paymentMethod, e.supplier_name AS supplierName, e.ref_type AS refType, e.ref_seq AS refSeq, e.created_at AS createdAt,
CASE WHEN e.ref_type = 'ORDER' THEN ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(oi.item_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_seq = e.ref_seq ) ELSE e.title END AS itemSummary,
CASE WHEN e.ref_type = 'ORDER' THEN ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(oi.quantity, '개') SEPARATOR ', ') FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_seq = e.ref_seq ) ELSE '-' END AS quantitySummary
FROM expenses e WHERE e.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND e.category_seq = #{categorySeq} AND DATE_FORMAT(e.expense_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY e.expense_date DESC, e.expense_seq DESC

SELECT o.order_seq AS orderSeq, o.order_no AS orderCode, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS orderDate,
buyer_store.store_seq AS storeSeq, partner_store.store_seq AS partnerStoreSeq, partner_store.company_name AS partnerName,
COALESCE( ( SELECT CONCAT( MIN(oi.item_name), CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN CONCAT(' 외 ', COUNT(*) - 1, '개 품목') ELSE '' END ) FROM order_items oi WHERE oi.order_seq = o.order_seq ), CONCAT('발주서 ', o.order_no) ) AS itemSummary, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.status AS status,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE pom.order_seq = o.order_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' ) THEN '결제완료' ELSE '미결제' END AS paymentStatus
FROM orders o JOIN stores buyer_store ON buyer_store.user_seq = o.buyer_seq JOIN stores partner_store ON partner_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq
WHERE buyer_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND partner_store.store_seq = #{partnerStoreSeq} AND IFNULL(o.status, '') != '취소'
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC, o.order_seq DESC
